kyc.title: Identity Verification
kyc.subtitle: Complete the steps below to verify your account

address.title: Address Verification
address.subtitle: Enter your current address
address.proofDocumentHint: Utility bill or bank statement. PDF, JPG or PNG, max 5MB.

identity.title: Identity Verification
identity.subtitle: Choose and upload your identity document
identity.frontImageHint: Clear photo of the front of your document
identity.backImageHint: Clear photo of the back of your document

selfie.title: Live Selfie
selfie.subtitle: Take a selfie to confirm your identity
selfie.instructions: Position your face in the center, in a well-lit area, without glasses or hat.
selfie.permissionDenied: Camera permission denied. Enable camera access in your browser settings.
selfie.cameraNotAvailable: Camera not available on this device.

review.title: Review & Submit
review.subtitle: Review your information before submitting
review.terms: I have read and accept the identity verification terms and conditions
review.termsRequired: You must accept the terms to continue

validation.phoneInvalid: Invalid phone number. Use international format: +1 555 000-0000
validation.dateOfBirthMinAge: You must be at least 18 years old
validation.fileTypeInvalid: Invalid file type. Use PDF, JPG or PNG

banner.title: Account not verified
banner.description: Complete identity verification to get full access.

success.title: Documents submitted successfully!
success.description: Your verification is under review. You will be notified shortly.

error.submit: Error submitting verification. Please try again.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

settings.title: App appearance
settings.description: Choose a global palette for the whole experience. The change affects header, sidebar, forms, lists, and the main dashboard areas.

language.title: Interface language
language.description: Choose how the experience should appear in flows that already support translation, such as identity verification.
language.selectDescription: This preference is saved in this browser and applies immediately.
language.label: Language

appearance.title: Brightness mode
appearance.description: Switch quickly between light and dark while preserving each palette's identity on darker surfaces too.
appearance.darkDescription: More focused, with dark tones adapted to each palette.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.description: Browse, search, and read the account ecosystem.

transactions.title: History
transactions.description: Movement overview with quick reading of incoming and outgoing entries.

transfer.title: Transfers
transfer.description: Primary action to send values between accounts.
